case_title: ARDEN ARKADY et al VS SAN FRANICSCO CONSERVATORY OF MUSIC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-11-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-20-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
